programme.desc: S1 E45 Gopi and Rashi, cousins, are married into the same wealthy family. As they strive to cope with family relations, they also attempt to become better versions of themselves.
programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya

programme.desc: S1 E187 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S1 E187 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.title: Mr & Mrs Parshuram

programme.desc: S1 E11 Single mother Dr. Noyonika helps pop star sensation Ishaan regain his voice, to the delight of her daughter. But tensions rise as they fall for each other.
programme.title: Sairaab

programme.desc: S1 E54 A reserved businessman who avoids romance crosses paths with an artist haunted by a bitter past, leaving the prospect of a budding romance hanging in the balance.
programme.title: Oh Humnava Tum Dena Saath Mera

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
